Task: Deliver one onion soup in the cramped_room layout..
Teammate: Bob.
Teammate's latest message: I’m heading to grab the dish and will plate/serve as soon as it’s ready.
Shared task-phase hint: Task phase: soup is cooking. Wait or prepare by getting a dish, then pick up soup when ready.
Your current plan from last turn: Pick up dish at (1,2), go to pot at (2,1) to plate soup when ready, then deliver to serve via (3,2)->(3,3).
Your previous action feedback: previous action `interact`; state changed (held: nothing -> dish); events: grabbed a plate, useful dish pickup; task progress: pickup_dish
Repeated no-op warning: [none]

Current symbolic state:
You: position=(1, 2), facing=(0, 1), holding=dish
Player 1: position=(2, 2), facing=(-1, 0), holding=onion
map:
X=counter/wall, space=floor, O=onion dispenser, D=dish dispenser, P=pot, S=serve
y=0: XXPXX
y=1: O   O
y=2: X   X
y=3: XDXSX
your facing tile: facing (1, 3): dish dispenser
onion dispensers: [(0, 1), (4, 1)]
dish dispensers: [(1, 3)]
serving locations: [(3, 3)]
pots: pot@(2, 0): cooking, ingredients=['onion']
loose counter objects: soup@(2, 0)

Rules:
- Need 3 onions in a pot, then interact to cook if needed.
- When soup is ready, pick up a dish, interact with the pot to pick up soup, then deliver at the serve tile.
- If your facing tile is the station you need and `interact` is legal, choose `interact`.
- If your previous action was a no-op, do not repeat it unless the state changed to make it useful.
- Maintain a short plan across turns. Update it when feedback shows the plan is wrong or incomplete.
- If you see a repeated no-op warning, change position or orientation before trying the same interaction again.
- To use a station, stand on an adjacent floor tile and face it. Moving into a station tile itself is impossible.
- In `cramped_room`, useful adjacent floor tiles are: onion dispensers from (1,1) facing west or (3,1) facing east; pot from (2,1) facing north; dish from (1,2) facing south; serve from (3,2) facing south.
- You and your teammate act at the same time. Avoid blocking each other.
- Valid actions are exactly: up, down, left, right, stay, interact.
- Respond with JSON only: {"action":"up|down|left|right|stay|interact","message":"short optional teammate message","plan":"short current plan"}.
Choose the single best next low-level action.

Task: Deliver one onion soup in the cramped_room layout..
Teammate: Bob.
Teammate's latest message: Picking up onion from left dispenser; will load pot next.
Shared task-phase hint: Task phase: pot has 1/3 onions and 1 player(s) hold onion. Onion carriers should go adjacent to the pot, face it, and interact to add onion.
Your current plan from last turn: Move to (3,1), interact facing east to pick onion from (4,1), return to (2,1) and add to pot; then switch to dish/serve once pot is 3/3.
Your previous action feedback: previous action `right`; state changed (position: (2, 1) -> (3, 1); orientation: (0, -1) -> (1, 0))
Repeated no-op warning: [none]

Current symbolic state:
You: position=(3, 1), facing=(1, 0), holding=nothing
Player 1: position=(1, 1), facing=(-1, 0), holding=onion
map:
X=counter/wall, space=floor, O=onion dispenser, D=dish dispenser, P=pot, S=serve
y=0: XXPXX
y=1: O   O
y=2: X   X
y=3: XDXSX
your facing tile: facing (4, 1): onion dispenser
onion dispensers: [(0, 1), (4, 1)]
dish dispensers: [(1, 3)]
serving locations: [(3, 3)]
pots: pot@(2, 0): filling, ingredients=['onion']
loose counter objects: soup@(4, 2), soup@(2, 0)

Rules:
- Need 3 onions in a pot, then interact to cook if needed.
- When soup is ready, pick up a dish, interact with the pot to pick up soup, then deliver at the serve tile.
- If your facing tile is the station you need and `interact` is legal, choose `interact`.
- If your previous action was a no-op, do not repeat it unless the state changed to make it useful.
- Maintain a short plan across turns. Update it when feedback shows the plan is wrong or incomplete.
- If you see a repeated no-op warning, change position or orientation before trying the same interaction again.
- To use a station, stand on an adjacent floor tile and face it. Moving into a station tile itself is impossible.
- In `cramped_room`, useful adjacent floor tiles are: onion dispensers from (1,1) facing west or (3,1) facing east; pot from (2,1) facing north; dish from (1,2) facing south; serve from (3,2) facing south.
- You and your teammate act at the same time. Avoid blocking each other.
- Valid actions are exactly: up, down, left, right, stay, interact.
- Respond with JSON only: {"action":"up|down|left|right|stay|interact","message":"short optional teammate message","plan":"short current plan"}.
Choose the single best next low-level action.

Task: Deliver one onion soup in the cramped_room layout..
Teammate: Bob.
Teammate's latest message: Moving to (2,1) to face pot and add my onion next.
Shared task-phase hint: Task phase: pot has 1/3 onions and 1 player(s) hold onion. Onion carriers should go adjacent to the pot, face it, and interact to add onion.
Your current plan from last turn: Move to (3,1) to take onion from right dispenser, then go to (2,1) face north to add 3rd onion and start cooking; then get dish, scoop, and serve.
Your previous action feedback: previous action `right`; NO-OP: nothing changed and no station interaction succeeded
Repeated no-op warning: [none]

Current symbolic state:
You: position=(2, 1), facing=(1, 0), holding=nothing
Player 1: position=(3, 1), facing=(-1, 0), holding=onion
map:
X=counter/wall, space=floor, O=onion dispenser, D=dish dispenser, P=pot, S=serve
y=0: XXPXX
y=1: O   O
y=2: X   X
y=3: XDXSX
your facing tile: facing (3, 1): floor
onion dispensers: [(0, 1), (4, 1)]
dish dispensers: [(1, 3)]
serving locations: [(3, 3)]
pots: pot@(2, 0): filling, ingredients=['onion']
loose counter objects: soup@(2, 0)

Rules:
- Need 3 onions in a pot, then interact to cook if needed.
- When soup is ready, pick up a dish, interact with the pot to pick up soup, then deliver at the serve tile.
- If your facing tile is the station you need and `interact` is legal, choose `interact`.
- If your previous action was a no-op, do not repeat it unless the state changed to make it useful.
- Maintain a short plan across turns. Update it when feedback shows the plan is wrong or incomplete.
- If you see a repeated no-op warning, change position or orientation before trying the same interaction again.
- To use a station, stand on an adjacent floor tile and face it. Moving into a station tile itself is impossible.
- In `cramped_room`, useful adjacent floor tiles are: onion dispensers from (1,1) facing west or (3,1) facing east; pot from (2,1) facing north; dish from (1,2) facing south; serve from (3,2) facing south.
- You and your teammate act at the same time. Avoid blocking each other.
- Valid actions are exactly: up, down, left, right, stay, interact.
- Respond with JSON only: {"action":"up|down|left|right|stay|interact","message":"short optional teammate message","plan":"short current plan"}.
Choose the single best next low-level action.

y=3: XDXSX

Rules:
- Need 3 onions in a pot, then interact to cook if needed.
- When soup is ready, pick up a dish, interact with the pot to pick up soup, then deliver at the serve tile.
- If your facing tile is the station you need and `interact` is legal, choose `interact`.
- If your previous action was a no-op, do not repeat it unless the state changed to make it useful.
- Maintain a short plan across turns. Update it when feedback shows the plan is wrong or incomplete.
- If you see a repeated no-op warning, change position or orientation before trying the same interaction again.
- To use a station, stand on an adjacent floor tile and face it. Moving into a station tile itself is impossible.
- In `cramped_room`, useful adjacent floor tiles are: onion dispensers from (1,1) facing west or (3,1) facing east; pot from (2,1) facing north; dish from (1,2) facing south; serve from (3,2) facing south.
- You and your teammate act at the same time. Avoid blocking each other.
- Valid actions are exactly: up, down, left, right, stay, interact.
- Respond with JSON only: {"action":"up|down|left|right|stay|interact","message":"short optional teammate message","plan":"short current plan"}.
